title: We Got A Pet!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Shoes went *splat* across the floor!
Puppy licked me—*slurp*—once more!
Wagged his tail so hard—*whap*!
Hugged him tight—he wants a nap!

[chorus]
We got a pet! We got a pet!
Jump up high and shout it yet!
Spin in circles, laugh—*crash*!
We got a pet! We got a pet!

[verse 2]
Fur so gold like morning light!
Stole my sock—oh what a sight!
Barks so loud—*boom*—like thunder!
Part volcano? Maybe under!

[chorus]
We got a pet! We got a pet!
Jump up high and shout it yet!
Spin in circles, laugh—*crash*!
We got a pet! We got a pet!

[ending]
Now we flop down—*poof*—just right,
Puppy snores all through the night.
Best day ever. Sleep so sweet.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, piano, bass, and claps, 121 BPM, groovy and melodic, catchy hook, warm rhythm, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: Sunlight spills through the kitchen window at 4:17 PM, glinting off the puppy’s wriggling golden fur as you burst in, sneakers skidding on the linoleum—arms flung wide, voice cracking with the scream, *"WE GOT A PET!"* while the dog licks your chin and your little brother crashes into your legs, all three of you collapsing into a giggling, squirming heap on the checkered rug.
cover_description: Kid and puppy sprawled on checkered rug, sunlight streaming, one sock missing.
